data.title: Autozi shareholder to invest USD 30M in share purchase at USD 5 each, showing confidence in growth.Character Count: 102
data.description: Today, Autozi (Stock Code: AZI), a prominent provider of cloud-based supply chain platforms in China's automotive sector, disclosed that its board of directors received a Share Increase Commitment Letter from Dr. Zhang Houqi, an individual associated with the company. This news was announced on January 28, 2026 in Beijing.

data.title: SwiftStart plans to invest $80 million in TIRX at $1.50 per share, showing strategic intent. Beijing, Jan. 28, 2026.
data.description: In Beijing on January 28, 2026, TIRX (Nasdaq: TIRX) disclosed a strategic Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with SwiftStart Inc., its key investor. Under the MOU, SwiftStart Inc. has indicated its plan to collaborate with TIRX on a variety of initiatives.

data.title: TEGNA's new mobile app offers thousands of original daily videos from local reporters, weather teams in 50 markets.
data.description: TEGNA has rolled out new mobile applications in 50 markets, providing real-time updates on news and weather. The apps feature content from local journalists and meteorologists, ensuring comprehensive coverage for users.

data.title: NordFX wins 2 industry awards in 2025 for execution quality and reliability, highlighting its strong global reputation.
data.description: In Gros-Islet, Saint Lucia, NordFX, a leading global multi-asset brokerage firm, was recognized with two industry awards in 2025, emphasizing its excellence in execution and client trust worldwide. These accolades solidify NordFX's position as a reputable player in the market. The company's award-winning performance showcases its dedication to providing exceptional service and reliability to clients across various markets. This recognition serves as a testament to NordFX's commitment to excellence and underscores its status as a trusted brokerage firm in the global financial industry.

data.title: MHP is the first Ukrainian agricultural company to become an Official Partner of the World Economic Forum, a key global platform.
data.description: In a recent announcement from Kyiv, Ukraine on January 28, 2026, it was revealed that MHP has achieved Official Partner status with the prestigious World Economic Forum (WEF). This milestone makes MHP the inaugural Ukrainian agricultural company to secure a spot on this prominent worldwide platform. Partners of the World Economic Forum, which holds significant influence on a global scale, are esteemed organizations shaping international policies and initiatives.

data.title: OKX Card launched in Europe to simplify crypto payments globally, offering direct stablecoin payments with zero fees and up to 20% rewards.
data.description: In Malta, OKX, a prominent cryptocurrency platform and onchain technology firm, has revealed the launch of OKX Card in Europe. The OKX Card aims to simplify the use of cryptocurrencies in daily transactions. Unlike other crypto cards that necessitate manual asset conversion, balance preloading, or hidden fees, the OKX Card allows direct stablecoin payments globally where Mastercard is recognized. Users can make payments with zero fees and receive instant crypto rewards reaching up to 20% on elig…

data.title: Littelfuse (NASDAQ: LFUS) reports Q4 2025 results exceeding expectations and acquisition of Basler Electric. CEO expresses pride.
data.description: In Chicago today, Littelfuse, Inc. (NASDAQ: LFUS) announced its financial performance for the fourth quarter ending on December 27, 2025. The company, known for creating innovative solutions for safe energy transfer, shared positive results. Littelfuse's President and CEO, Greg Henderson, expressed pride in the teams for ending the year on a strong note. The fourth quarter results exceeded the projected range, and the acquisition of Basler Electric was finalized successfully. This highlights the company's significant momentum and growth.

data.title: Gilat Satellite Networks Ltd. will be attending investor conferences to present satellite networking solutions - NASDAQ: GILT, TASE: GILT.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, Gilat Satellite Networks Ltd. disclosed that its executives will partake in upcoming conferences. The company, a prominent satellite networking technology provider, stated that individuals from its management team will be involved in these events. Gilat Satellite Networks Ltd. is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol GILT and on TASE as GILT.

data.title: 7-Eleven raises $14M for Children's Miracle Network in 2025, supporting 113 local facilities nationwide.
data.description: 7-Eleven, Speedway, and Stripes stores based in Irving, Texas are aiding in funding nationwide care for children through in-store donations. 7-Eleven, Inc., partnering with Children's Miracle Network, disclosed that over $14 million was collected in 2025 to assist 113 local organizations.

data.title: Focus FS receives $8 million from Hibernia and Hebron Projects for AI safety initiative in offshore oil and gas.
data.description: In St. John's, NL, on January 28, 2026, Focus FS revealed a significant Artificial Intelligence (AI) endeavor worth $8 million over several years. This initiative targets the improvement of safety, dependability, and operational oversight within the offshore oil and gas sector. The Hebron and Hibernia Projects are set to provide more than a substantial sum towards this project.

data.title: North West launches Education Insights event series with high-profile guests like Olympian Marlon Devonish, aiming to better support youth resilience.
data.description: At a recent event in Manchester, several notable figures were in attendance including former Lioness Jess Clarke, Musharaf Asghar from Channel 4's 'Educating Yorkshire', and Olympic gold medallist Marlon Devonish, MBE. The event marked the beginning of the North West's inaugural Education Insights series, which aims to foster collaborative efforts to improve support in the education sector. With a focus on exploring innovative approaches, the event brought together a diverse group of individuals to discuss and strategize ways to enhance educational outcomes.

data.title: Beamr Imaging Ltd. (NASDAQ: BMR) to demonstrate video workflow validation powered by NVIDIA at Mile High Video 2026 in Denver, Colorado, on February 2-5, 2026.
data.description: A tech company, Beamr Imaging Ltd. (NASDAQ: BMR), will be participating at Mile High Video 2026, set to take place from February 2 to 5, 2026, in Denver, Colorado. The company will be showcasing a validation framework that assesses the quality preservation of compressed and AI-enhanced video as perceived by viewers. This event brings together industry leaders to explore the latest trends and developments in the video technology sector. Beamr Imaging Ltd. is known for its expertise in video optimization technology and solutions. The conference will provide a platform for networking and knowledge exchange among professionals in the field.

data.title: Extreme Networks (Nasdaq: EXTR) reports Q2 FY2026 results, reflecting 7 consecutive quarters of revenue growth. Platform ONE bookings doubled plan. CEO Ed Meyercord comments on taking share in enterprise networking.
data.description: Extreme Networks, Inc. (Nasdaq: EXTR) based in Morrisville, N.C., announced its financial results for the second quarter of fiscal 2026, closing on December 31, 2025. Ed Meyercord, President and CEO of Extreme, stated that the company is gaining market share in enterprise networking, evident through seven consecutive quarters of revenue growth. Bookings for Extreme Platform ONE in the quarter were double the initial plan, underscoring the demand for their platform.

data.title: Corning posts record Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results, with Q4 sales up 14% to $4.41B and core EPS up 26% to $0.72. Full-year core sales at $16.41B and core EPS at $2.52. Look ahead to Q1 for continued growth.
data.description: Corning Incorporated (NYSE: GLW) has announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025, along with its outlook for the first quarter of 2026. The company reported record-breaking performance, with core sales and core EPS increasing by 14% to $4.41 billion and 26% to $0.72 respectively, year-over-year in Q4. For the full year 2025, core sales grew by 13% to $16.41 billion, and core EPS increased by 29% to $2.52. Looking ahead to Q1 2026, management anticipates continued growth year-over-year.
